summary: A high‑quality audience recording captures the legendary three‑guitar jam of Dark Star into Spanish Jam (and Lovelight), delivering an authentic house‑sound experience.
review: The audience source shines by preserving the house ambience and letting Peter Green, Jerry Garcia and Duane Allman be heard clearly, especially during the soaring Dark Star → Spanish Jam sequence and the subsequent Lovelight climax. Reviewers consistently praise the musical chemistry and overall setlist while noting only occasional tonal shifts in the tape, making it a highly listenable document of this historic 1970 show.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviews (7 out of 9) are 5‑star and highlight exceptional performance and a listenable audience recording; only minor comments about sound changes lower the score slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear house ambience with authentic balcony feel; occasional tonal shifts but overall consistent and very listenable, especially compared to the poor‑mix board tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows brilliantly through an extended Dark Star that segues into Spanish Jam and culminates with Lovelight, showcasing inspired interplay among the three guest guitarists.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his dueling leads with Peter Green and Duane Allman, delivering a standout guitar performance.
